title: HANDLANDY 3 Pairs Kids Gardening Gloves for Age 2-13, Toddler Children Garden Yard Work Outdoor Playing Gloves, Rubber Coating, for Girls Boys Youth (Size 4)
features: Soft & Comfortable Nitrile Coating: These kids gardening gloves feature a soft nitrile coating that provides comfort and protection while allowing kids to handle plants, soil, and tools with ease.
Breathable & High Dexterity: Designed with seamless lining and stretchy fabric, these childrens work gloves are breathable and flexible, offering high dexterity for little hands to move freely.
Snug Fit with Elastic Wrist Closure: The elastic knit wrist closure ensures a snug fit, keeping dirt and debris out while providing a secure and comfortable feel.

Bright Colors & Cute Patterns: Available in bright colors and adorable patterns, these toddler gardening gloves are fun and appealing for kids, encouraging them to enjoy gardening and outdoor activities.

3-Pack Great Gift Idea: Includes 3 pairs of gloves, making it a perfect gift for kids who love gardening, outdoor play, or helping out in the yard. Five sizes options: Size 2 (fit for 2-4 years old), Size 3 (fit for 5-6 years old), Size 4 (fit for 7-8 years old), Size 5 (fit for 9-10 years old), Size 6 (fit for 11-13 years old).
description: Product Description Do your kids like to spend time outdoors? Are you looking for an ongoing project that you and your family can work on together? Then start gardening with HANDLANDY kids gardening gripper glove. Our kids yard gloves will protect your hands getting dirty and create terrific memories. Kids gardening experience is not complete without a perfect set of their own gardening gloves! Home Gardening Enjoying the gardening with families and learn about how plants grow. Let kids enjoy helping in the garden or with the lawn with hand that are protected like their grandmother or grandfathers. Weeding the Yard Get your kids to assist you in pulling out and discarding the weeds, have fun while getting help with the yard work. Raking Autumn Leaves Play and work are hard to separate for kids when it comes to outdoor chores,just let kids help chores. Watering the Plants Allow kids to give a drink to outdoor plants, flowers and vegetables. Latex Free- Comfy Nitrile Coating Combined with the Nitrile Construction, HANDLANDY children work gloves are simply the safest choice against allergic reactions or sensitive skin types. Dexterity Seamless Liner Made from breathable flexible lining that gives boys and girls ventilation and comfort. Gift your kids these gardening gloves, give kids ultimate satisfaction while working in the garden. Elastic Knit Wrist Stretchy & breathable materials to fit snugly and keeps dirt out. Whether your kiddo is playing in the sand, dirt or maybe even some mud, these lovely gardening gloves from HANDLANDY will help keep their hands clean and safe. Five Size to Choose Ideal gift for toddler, childrens, little boyes, little girls, ages 2-13 years kids. Size 2 --- for age 2-4, Size 3 ---for age 5-6, Size 4 ---for age 7-8, Size 5 ---for age 9-10, size 6 ---for age 11-13
